access_token.description: 7shifts API access token used only for Bearer auth.

availability_id.description: Required path or query value for streams that reference availability_id.

base_url.description: 7shifts API base URL override for tests or proxies.

company_id.description: 7shifts company id used by company-scoped streams and write actions.

date.description: Required date or date-time filter for streams that reference date.

date_end.description: Required date or date-time filter for streams that reference date_end.

date_start.description: Required date or date-time filter for streams that reference date_start.

department_id.description: Required path or query value for streams that reference department_id.

employee_id.description: Required path or query value for streams that reference employee_id.

end_date.description: Required date or date-time filter for streams that reference end_date.

event_id.description: Required path or query value for streams that reference event_id.

from.description: Required date or date-time filter for streams that reference from.

id.description: Required path or query value for streams that reference id.

identifier.description: Required path or query value for streams that reference identifier.

list_id.description: Required path or query value for streams that reference list_id.

location_id.description: Required path or query value for streams that reference location_id.

log_book_ids.description: Required path or query value for streams that reference log_book_ids.

payroll_period_id.description: Required path or query value for streams that reference payroll_period_id.

punches.description: Required path or query value for streams that reference punches.

receipt_id.description: Required path or query value for streams that reference receipt_id.

role_id.description: Required path or query value for streams that reference role_id.

shift_id.description: Required path or query value for streams that reference shift_id.

start_date.description: Lower bound used by incremental legacy streams and by required date filters when a stream declares start_date.

time_off_id.description: Required path or query value for streams that reference time_off_id.

time_punch_id.description: Required path or query value for streams that reference time_punch_id.

tip_pool_settings_uuid.description: Required path or query value for streams that reference tip_pool_settings_uuid.

to.description: Required date or date-time filter for streams that reference to.

user_id.description: Required path or query value for streams that reference user_id.

uuid.description: Required path or query value for streams that reference uuid.
